description: A testimonial carousel displaying customer quotes with star ratings, names, roles, and avatars. Manual navigation with arrows and dots. Use for customer success stories, social proof near CTAs. Layout: large centered quote card with star rating, quote text, author info with avatar. Arrow and dot navigation.
label: Testimonial Carousel

testimonials.quote: Squilla transformed how we manage our website. The speed and flexibility are unmatched. We migrated from WordPress and haven't looked back.
The extension system is brilliant. We built custom workflows in days that would have taken months with other platforms. Support team is incredibly responsive.
Finally a CMS that developers and content teams both love. Clean API, great admin UI, and blazing fast page loads. Our bounce rate dropped 40%.
